name: Cooks Global Foods Limited
summary: Cooks Global Foods Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates in the food and beverage industry. The company operates and franchises Esquires Coffee outlets in the United Kingdom, Ireland, Portugal, Bahrain, Kuwait, Syria, Saudi Arabia, Jordan, Pakistan, Indonesia, Canada, and China. It also supplies tea/coffee/beverages and fresh produce. In addition, the company engages in holding intellectual property, and the store and office lease holding business, as well as the provision of nominee and name protection services. Cooks Global Foods Limited was incorporated in 2008 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.
